summary: Visual overhaul and feature testing for MyStudyBody app. Tested Dashboard gradient card, dark theme, quick action buttons, and full Pomodoro feature set including duration chips, gradient ring timer, subject picker modal with add/delete.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: useNativeDriver not supported on web preview (expected behavior, not a bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pomodoro and Dashboard visual upgrade features verified working. Duration chips 25/40/50/60 update timer correctly. Subject modal opens, shows gradient radio dot for selected, trash icons present, add/delete subject both work. Gradient ring timer visible. Dashboard has gradient total hours card and gradient quick action buttons with dark #080D1A background.
